documents.content: Project Titan — Long-Lead Equipment Shipment Tracker Report Date: 20-Jul-2026 | Source: Procurement Team Weekly Update Equipment PO No. Vendor Linked TaskPlanned ShipActual/Revised Ship Planned Delivery Revised Delivery Status Transformer (2000 kVA)PO-4471 Voltamp Transformers A210 20-Jul-26 20-Jul-26 31-Jul-26 31-Jul-26 On Track UPS System (1000 kVA)PO-4488 Apex Power Systems A310 25-Jul-26 08-Aug-26 10-Aug-26 24-Aug-26 DELAYED — 14 days Diesel Generator (2500 kVA) PO-4502 GenPro Industries A400 22-Jul-26 22-Jul-26 04-Aug-26 04-Aug-26 On Track CRAH Units (x6) PO-4390 CoolAir Systems A500 01-Jul-26 28-Jun-26 15-Jul-26 12-Jul-26 Ahead of Schedule Switchgear Panels (11kV) PO-4512 Schneider Electric India A220 26-Jul-26 02-Aug-26 05-Aug-26 12-Aug-26 DELAYED — 7 days Fire Suppression SystemPO-4530 Kidde-Fenwal A600 10-Aug-26 10-Aug-26 20-Aug-26 20-Aug-26 On Track Flagged Risk: UPS System delivery slip of 14 days directly impacts critical-path task A310 → A320 (UPS Installation), which is a predecessor to A600 (Cabling) and A700 (IST). documents.name: 05_commissioning_ist_checklist.pdf
documents.preview: Project Titan — Integrated Systems Testing (IST) Checklist Reference Standards: TIA-942, BICSI 002, Uptime Institute Tier III | Rev: 1 Section 1: Power Chain Testing Test ID Test Description Acceptance Criteria Status Linked Punch Item IST-P01 Utility-to-Generator transfer time ≤ 10 seconds to full load Pending - IST-P02 UPS battery autonomy load bank test ≥ rated autonomy at 100% load Pending PL-0231 (UPS install incomplete) IST-P03 N+1 UPS module failure simulation No load drop on single modul
documents.content: Project Titan — Integrated Systems Testing (IST) Checklist Reference Standards: TIA-942, BICSI 002, Uptime Institute Tier III | Rev: 1 Section 1: Power Chain Testing Test ID Test Description Acceptance Criteria Status Linked Punch Item IST-P01 Utility-to-Generator transfer time ≤ 10 seconds to full load Pending - IST-P02 UPS battery autonomy load bank test ≥ rated autonomy at 100% load Pending PL-0231 (UPS install incomplete) IST-P03 N+1 UPS module failure simulation No load drop on single module fail Pending - IST-P04 Transformer insulation resistance test ≥ 1000 MΩ Pass - IST-P05 Switchgear protection relay coordination Trip within coordination curve tolerancePending - Section 2: Cooling Chain Testing Test ID Test Description Acceptance Criteria Status Linked Punch Item IST-C01 CRAH N+1 failover test Room temp stays within setpoint ±2°C on unit fail Pending - IST-C02 Chilled water loop pressure test No leaks at 1.5x operating pressure Pass - IST-C03 Full load heat rejection test Sustained rejection at 100% IT load for 4 hrs Pending - Section 3: Open Punch List (as of 20-Jul-2026) Punch ID Area/System Description Raised Date Status PL-0198 Electrical Room Cable tray labeling incomplete 05-Jul-26 Open PL-0212 Generator Yard Weatherproof enclosure sealant touch-up 08-Jul-26 Open PL-0231 UPS Room UPS installation not yet started — awaiting delayed delivery (PO-4488) 18-Jul-26 Open — High Priority PL-0244 Cooling Plant CRAH unit #4 vibration above threshold 19-Jul-26 Open Note: Test IST-P02 cannot proceed until punch item PL-0231 (linked to delayed UPS delivery, PO-4488) is closed. This is a likely test-failure/blocked-test prediction for the Commissioning Copilot module. -- 1 of 1 --

documents.name: 02_vendor_submittal_datasheet.pdf
documents.preview: Vendor Submittal Package Supplier: Apex Power Systems Pvt. Ltd. | Submittal No: APS-SUB-0231 | Rev: A 1. UPS System — As Offered (Model: APEX-UM1000) Parameter Offered Value Rated Capacity 1000 kVA / 900 kW Input Voltage 415V AC, 3-Phase, 50 Hz Output Voltage 415V AC ± 2%, 3-Phase Topology Double Conversion On-Line, Modular Efficiency (ECO mode) 96.8% Battery Autonomy 8 minutes at full load Redundancy Configuration N (parallel expansion optional) Operating Temperature 0°C to 40°C Compliance Stan
documents.content: Vendor Submittal Package Supplier: Apex Power Systems Pvt. Ltd. | Submittal No: APS-SUB-0231 | Rev: A 1. UPS System — As Offered (Model: APEX-UM1000) Parameter Offered Value Rated Capacity 1000 kVA / 900 kW Input Voltage 415V AC, 3-Phase, 50 Hz Output Voltage 415V AC ± 2%, 3-Phase Topology Double Conversion On-Line, Modular Efficiency (ECO mode) 96.8% Battery Autonomy 8 minutes at full load Redundancy Configuration N (parallel expansion optional) Operating Temperature 0°C to 40°C Compliance Standard IEC 62040-3 2. Transformer — As Offered (Model: TR-2000-DYN) Parameter Offered Value Rating 2000 kVA Primary Voltage 11 kV ± 5% Secondary Voltage 433V Cooling Type ONAN Vector Group Dyn11 Impedance 7.1% at 75°C Insulation Class Class B Standard IS 2026 / IEC 60076 3. Precision Cooling (CRAH Unit) — As Offered (Model: COOLAIR CX-120) Parameter Offered Value Cooling Capacity 110 kW sensible Airflow 16,500 CFM Chilled Water Supply Temp 12°C ± 1°C Return Water Temp 18°C Redundancy N+1 Fan Type EC Plug Fan, Variable Speed Filter Class MERV 8 minimum -- 1 of 2 -- Noise Level 82 dB(A) at 1m 4. Diesel Generator — As Offered (Model: GENPRO 2500) Parameter Offered Value Prime Rating 2500 kVA Voltage / Frequency 415V, 50 Hz Fuel Tank Capacity 6 hours at 100% load Emission Compliance CPCB IV+ Sound Attenuation Weatherproof enclosure, 79 dB(A) at 1m Paralleling Capable of N+1 paralleling with synchronizing panel Submitted for approval. Please confirm acceptance or raise technical query (RFI) within 5 working days. -- 2 of 2 --

documents.name: 01_client_spec_sheet.pdf
documents.preview: Project Titan — Hyderabad Data Centre Campus Client Technical Specification Sheet — Electrical & Mechanical Package Doc No: TIT-SPEC-ELEC-004 | Rev: C | Issued by: Owner's Engineer 1. UPS System — Required Specification Parameter Required Value Rated Capacity 1200 kVA / 1080 kW Input Voltage 415V AC, 3-Phase, 50 Hz Output Voltage 415V AC ± 1%, 3-Phase Topology Double Conversion On-Line, Modular Efficiency (ECO mode) ≥ 97.5% Battery Autonomy 10 minutes at full load Redundancy Configuration N+1 (m
documents.content: Project Titan — Hyderabad Data Centre Campus Client Technical Specification Sheet — Electrical & Mechanical Package Doc No: TIT-SPEC-ELEC-004 | Rev: C | Issued by: Owner's Engineer 1. UPS System — Required Specification Parameter Required Value Rated Capacity 1200 kVA / 1080 kW Input Voltage 415V AC, 3-Phase, 50 Hz Output Voltage 415V AC ± 1%, 3-Phase Topology Double Conversion On-Line, Modular Efficiency (ECO mode) ≥ 97.5% Battery Autonomy 10 minutes at full load Redundancy Configuration N+1 (minimum) Operating Temperature 0°C to 40°C Compliance Standard IEC 62040-3, Tier III per Uptime Institute 2. Transformer — Required Specification Parameter Required Value Rating 2000 kVA Primary Voltage 11 kV ± 5% Secondary Voltage 433V Cooling Type ONAN Vector Group Dyn11 Impedance 6.25% at 75°C Insulation Class Class F Standard IS 2026 / IEC 60076 3. Precision Cooling (CRAH Unit) — Required Specification Parameter Required Value Cooling Capacity 120 kW sensible Airflow 18,000 CFM Chilled Water Supply Temp 12°C ± 1°C Return Water Temp 18°C Redundancy N+1 -- 1 of 2 -- Fan Type EC Plug Fan, Variable Speed Filter Class MERV 8 minimum Noise Level ≤ 78 dB(A) at 1m 4. Diesel Generator — Required Specification Parameter Required Value Prime Rating 2500 kVA Voltage / Frequency 415V, 50 Hz Fuel Tank Capacity Minimum 8 hours at 100% load Emission Compliance CPCB IV+ Sound Attenuation Weatherproof, Super Silent Enclosure ≤ 75 dB(A) at 1m Paralleling Capable of N+1 paralleling with synchronizing panel Note: This specification sheet represents the Owner's Engineer baseline requirements. All vendor submittals and shop drawings must be checked against this document prior to procurement approval. Any deviation must be logged as a Non-Conformance Report (NCR) in the Quality Management System. -- 2 of 2 --

project.projectName: Project Titan — Hyderabad Data Centre Campus
project.executiveSummary: Project Titan faces critical path schedule delay from equipment delivery slips. Technical submittals show major non-conformances against client specifications.

dashboard.note: Project Titan faces critical path schedule delay from equipment delivery slips. Technical submittals show major non-conformances against client specifications.

schedule.slipHeadline: UPS System delivery is delayed from 10-Aug-26 to 24-Aug-26, slipping project completion.

risks.recommendation: Expedite shipment to mitigate critical path impact to project completion date.
Issue NCR for 1000 kVA offered versus 1200 kVA required spec.

commissioning.test: IST-P02 UPS battery autonomy load bank test
commissioning.issue: PL-0231 UPS installation not started awaiting delivery

widgets.label: Procurement Progress

insights: UPS delivery slip of 14 days pushes project completion from 09-Oct-2026 to 23-Oct-2026.
Vendor submittal offers 1000 kVA UPS and 8 min autonomy against 1200 kVA and 10 min spec.
